password.label: Password

vendor.title: Create your vendor account
vendor.subtitle: Receive quote requests and grow your event business.

vendorOnboarding.title: Welcome to EventFlow
vendorOnboarding.body: Your vendor account is ready. Complete your business profile so the EventFlow team can approve it and you can start receiving quote requests.
vendorOnboarding.pendingNote: Your profile will be pending approval once completed.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Welcome back to EventFlow.
login.captchaNotice: For security, please solve the verification to continue.

errors.CAPTCHA_REQUIRED: For security, complete the verification and try again.
errors.CAPTCHA_INVALID: Security verification failed. Please try again.
errors.RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Too many attempts. Try again in {seconds} seconds.
errors.RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED_NO_TIME: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
errors.ALREADY_AUTHENTICATED: You already have an active session
errors.UNEXPECTED: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

login.resetSuccess: Your password has been reset. Sign in with your new password.

forgot.title: Recover your password
forgot.subtitle: We'll send you a link to reset it.
forgot.success: If the email exists, you will receive a link to reset your password.

reset.title: Set your new password

password.label: New password
password.help: At least 10 characters, with at least one letter and one number.
